cards.title: Google Discloses AI-Generated Ads
cards.body: Google will now indicate when advertisers use generative AI tools to create or edit ads. This new transparency feature helps users identify AI-generated advertising content.

cards.title: Gradium Raises $100M Seed Round
cards.body: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium announced a major seed extension round backed by Nvidia. The ElevenLabs competitor is expanding its voice AI capabilities.

cards.title: Government AI Safety Review Unclear
cards.body: The specifics of government dialogue with OpenAI and Anthropic on frontier model safety remain murky. Questions persist about how agencies approved these model releases.

cards.title: Opt Out of Meta's AI Image Generator
cards.body: Meta's AI image generator uses public Instagram photos by default unless users opt out. Here's how to prevent your photos from being used.

cards.title: Meta AI Chips Enter Production Phase
cards.body: Meta's custom AI chips will begin production in September. The company designed them modularly to adapt as AI needs rapidly evolve.

cards.title: Nvidia Faces Compute Marketplace Competition
cards.body: Nvidia created the valuable compute market but now faces intense competition. Simpler technologies and less flashy companies are gaining market share.

cards.title: Anthropic's Claude Reflects on AI Adoption
cards.body: Claude's new Reflect dashboard visualizes user AI usage patterns. The feature subtly reinforces how dependent daily work has become on Anthropic's chatbot.

cards.title: Three AI IPOs Eclipse 25 Years of Exits
cards.body: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX IPOs will generate more value than all U.S. VC-backed exits since 2000. This represents unprecedented AI company valuations.

cards.title: Ollama Raises $65M, Hits 9M Users
cards.body: Benchmark-backed Ollama reached nearly 9 million users by enabling developers to run AI locally on PCs. The open-source tool has amassed 176,000 GitHub stars.

cards.title: Character.AI Launches Interactive Microdrama Series
cards.body: Character.AI entered content production with shows users can interact with in real-time. Viewers can chat with characters, ask questions, and roleplay storylines.

cards.title: Fundamentum Launches $200M Third Fund
cards.body: Nandan Nilekani stepped back from his GP role as Fundamentum expands leadership. The fund targets AI and fintech startups across India.

cards.title: Lovable Seeks $13.2B Valuation Doubling
cards.body: AI development platform Lovable is in talks to double its valuation to $13.2 billion. The $300 million round is reportedly led by Menlo Ventures.

cards.title: Google Deepfake Detector Debunks McConnell Hoax
cards.body: Google's deepfake detection system identified an AI-generated image of Senator Mitch McConnell. The fabricated hospital image was successfully debunked using the technology.

cards.title: SpaceX Releases Grok 4.5 Model
cards.body: SpaceX AI released Grok 4.5, an 'Opus-class' model according to Elon Musk. The model promises cheaper, more efficient performance than competing AI systems.

cards.title: General Intuition Bets on Robotics AI
cards.body: General Intuition believes robotics is approaching its 'ChatGPT moment' using video game training data. The startup aims to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

cards.title: Google Photos Adds AI Video Remix
cards.body: Google Photos launched an AI 'Video Remix' tool for cinematic editing. Features include relighting, background swaps, and artistic style application to videos.

cards.title: Video Games Better Than Internet Training Data
cards.body: A CEO argues video game data outperforms internet data for AGI training. Large language models excel at text but struggle with spatial reasoning.

cards.title: Meta AI Glasses Privacy Contradiction Revealed
cards.body: Meta added safeguards to prevent secret recording with AI glasses but expands personal data collection. The company's privacy approach contradicts its safety messaging.

cards.title: OpenAI Releases Advanced Voice Models
cards.body: OpenAI unveiled new voice models supporting simultaneous speaking and listening. The dual-function capability enables real-time translation and natural conversations.

cards.title: Prime Intellect Raises $130M Series A
cards.body: Prime Intellect secured $130 million to help enterprises build custom AI agents. The startup enables organizations to train agentic systems independently from frontier labs.

cards.title: Google Discloses AI-Generated Ads
cards.body: Google is adding a new feature to indicate when advertisers use generative AI tools to create or edit ads. This transparency measure aims to help users understand which ads are AI-generated.

cards.title: Gradium Raises $100M Seed Round
cards.body: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium announced a massive seed extension backed by Nvidia. The company competes directly with ElevenLabs in the voice AI space.

cards.title: Government AI Safety Oversight Questioned
cards.body: The exact nature of government oversight on frontier AI models remains unclear. Questions linger about how OpenAI and Anthropic coordinate safety reviews with regulators.

cards.title: Meta AI Image Generator Privacy Controls
cards.body: Meta's new AI image generator uses public Instagram photos by default. Users can now opt out to prevent their photos from training the system.

cards.title: Meta Custom AI Chips Enter Production
cards.body: Meta's custom AI chips will begin production in September with a modular design approach. The company anticipates its AI needs will evolve rapidly during chip development.

cards.title: Anthropic Claude Reflect Dashboard Launches
cards.body: Anthropic unveiled Claude's Reflect dashboard showing how users interact with the AI chatbot. The feature subtly reinforces daily reliance on Claude for work tasks.

cards.title: AI Giants Poised for Massive IPOs
cards.body: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX IPOs are expected to generate more value than all US VC-backed exits since 2000. Three companies alone could reshape startup valuations.

cards.title: Ollama Raises $65M, Hits 9M Users
cards.body: Open-source AI tool Ollama secured $65M funding backed by Benchmark. The platform helps developers easily run AI models on personal computers.

cards.title: Character.AI Creates Interactive Productions
cards.body: Character.AI launched original microdrama productions where users can chat with characters. The platform lets viewers roleplay different storylines within shows.

cards.title: Google's Deepfake Detector Debunks Hoax
cards.body: Google's deepfake detection system identified a fabricated image of Senator Mitch McConnell as AI-generated. The tool helped expose the misleading image circulating online.

cards.title: SpaceX Releases Grok 4.5 Model
cards.body: SpaceX AI released Grok 4.5, described by Elon Musk as an 'Opus-class model.' The system promises cheaper and more efficient performance than competing AI models.

cards.title: Video Games Train Robotics Foundation Models
cards.body: General Intuition is using millions of hours of video game data to train physical AI foundation models. The approach could reduce reliance on real-world robot data collection.

cards.title: Google Photos Adds Video Remix Tool
cards.body: Google Photos launched a new AI 'Video Remix' feature with cinematic relighting and artistic style options. The tool can brighten dark clips and swap backgrounds automatically.

cards.title: OpenAI Releases New Voice Models
cards.body: OpenAI launched new voice models enabling simultaneous speaking and listening for live conversations. The advancement unlocks real-time translation capabilities.

cards.title: Prime Intellect Raises $130M Series A
cards.body: Prime Intellect secured $130M to help enterprises build custom AI agents. The 2024-founded startup enables organizations to train agentic systems independently.

cards.title: Lovable Doubles Valuation to $13.2B
cards.body: AI startup Lovable is in talks to raise $300 million led by Menlo Ventures. The round would double the company's valuation significantly.

cards.title: AI Scaling Architecture Foundations Discussed
cards.body: IT leaders must plan AI architecture investments as agentic systems expand organizational use cases. Rapid AI evolution introduces both opportunities and risks for enterprise deployment.

cards.title: Sam Altman's $300 Stake Proposal
cards.body: Sam Altman continues promoting his plan for Americans to share in AI-generated wealth. OpenAI's CEO argues citizens deserve stakes in AI prosperity.

cards.title: Ivy League Prof Suspects AI Cheating
cards.body: A professor ordered an in-person final exam after suspecting widespread AI cheating in class. Test scores dropped 50% when students took the exam without AI access.

cards.title: Lawsuit: Grok Used for Illegal Images
cards.body: A man allegedly used Grok to generate over 7,000 sexual images of his stepdaughter. The case raises questions about AI safety guardrails and content generation.

cards.title: Google Updates Android Bench LLMs
cards.body: Google updated Android Bench with new large language model tests. Gemini still trails behind competing AI models in benchmark performance.

cards.title: Hackers Exploit AI Tools for Botnets
cards.body: Nine popular AI tools can be exploited by hackers to assemble massive botnets. The vulnerability demonstrates security risks in widely-used AI platforms.
